answer:
Freshdesk uses HTTP Basic Authentication for all API requests [1][2][3]. To authenticate, you must provide your personal API key (found in your agent profile) as the username [4][2]. For the password, you can use any non-empty string, such as a dummy character like X [5][2].

When using tools like curl, the authentication is handled via the -u flag [5][2]. In programmatic requests, you must encode the string "APIKEY:X" into base64 and include it in the Authorization header [6].

```bash
curl -u YOUR_API_KEY:X -H "Content-Type: application/json" https://domain.freshdesk.com/api/v2/tickets
```
